Along the curve  
x = t , y = t  (0 ≤ t ≤ 1)

1. Function on the curve  
   x + y = t + t = 2t.

2. Differential of arc length  
   dx/dt = 1, dy/dt = 1  
   ds = √[(dx/dt)² + (dy/dt)²] dt = √(1² + 1²) dt = √2 dt.

3. Line integral

   = √2 · ∫₀¹ 2t dt  
   = √2 · [t²]₀¹  
   = √2.

Therefore,  
∫₍C₎ (x + y) ds = √2.

$$ \mathbf{r}'(t) = \langle -\sin(t), \cos(t) \rangle $$
